title: Update the automation. after the date, change status to status
excerpt: im having an issue that the updates are happening daily when i only need them to happen once

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Chris_Essential - not exactly sure if this is what you are speaking of but if you add an additional condition to your automation it should stop it from running each day.
